title: biscutella variegata var. foliosa
intro: Biscutella variegata var. foliosa, commonly known as the Alpine Biscutella, is a rare, alpine perennial plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Biscutella variegata var. foliosa is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
